mechanics.text:
CHARACTER_ CREATION
DISGRACED ELEMENTAL
Once you were the pride of your sibko, ristar with unlimited potential. Your unarmed combat talents were apparent even the creche_ Your exceptional performance attracted the attention of Star Colonel Chou Vong; leader of your Bloodname House who personally awarded you the rank of warrior after your Tria Position You graduated into Vong command and joined the invasion of the Inner Sphere part of the Star Colonel' Sixty-Eighth Striker Cluster, where your Point participated in critical strike against dezgra moon-based  monitoring station_ That cam paign earned your unit place the Ghost Bear Remembrance All that changed on Alshain In the assault on that plan- et; you fell in combat and were taken as bondsman by House Kurita forces even as they evacuated the world; Your capture earned you the enmity of your former com- rades_ compounded when you learned of Star Colonel Chou Vong" disgrace and removal from command her association with you added to your own dishonor: bondsman, you dutifully served the Combine until you fell combat once again__this time against Periphery bandits_ You haven't been the same since. The Kurita doctors call post-traumatic stress syndrome_ The Clans call cowardice Declared unfit for duty, you sank into depression, wandering aimlessly from planet to planet until Clan-hat ing storekeeper wrongly accused you of shoplifting: Two years in Combine prison shook you out of your malaise, and kindly old cellmate taught you that not all Spheroids are hateful,6 Now; You seek redemption in whatever way You can find Though your Clan will not take you back; you believe that there must be worthy masters to serve somewhere_ even in tne misguided Inner Sphere
Affiliation: Clan (p 31); Stage 1: Eaily Childhood (Trueborn Creche) Event Roll 351. Stage Late Childhood (Trucborn Sibkol Event Roll 391. Staze Real Life (Tour of Duty: Clan) Event Roll 11 (p. 501. Stage Real Life (Tour of Duty: Clan) Event Roll 501. Stage Real Life (Tour 0f Duty: Inner Sphere) Event Roll 50). Stage Real Life (Ne er-Do-Well) Event Roll 491.
